metadata.name: blind_auctions
metadata.description: Privacy-preserving Vickrey blind auctions on Solana using Arcium MPC

instructions.name: cancel_auction
docs: Cancel an auction that has passed its deadline with zero bids.
Closes the auction account and refunds the rent-exempt lamports to the
creator. This is the only way to reclaim SOL from an auction that nobody
bid on — `close_auction` rejects auctions with `bid_count == 0`.

instructions.name: cast_bid
docs: Cast an encrypted bid. Each wallet may bid exactly once per auction.
- `bid_ciphertext`: The bid amount encrypted with the bidder's x25519 / MXE shared secret.
- `pub_key`:        Bidder's ephemeral x25519 public key.
- `nonce`:          Encryption nonce for the bid.
The bidder's slot index is assigned on-chain atomically before queuing
so two simultaneous bids can never overwrite the same slot.

accounts.name: bid_vault
docs: SOL escrow vault for this bidder. Receives `ceiling` lamports at bid time;
drained at settle (winner) or withdraw (losers) after finalization.

accounts.name: bid_record
docs: PDA uniqueness = double-bid prevention (init fails if bidder already bid)

instructions.name: claim_credits
docs: Claim free credits from the faucet (up to MAX_CLAIM_AMOUNT per call).
Enforces a per-wallet cooldown of CLAIM_COOLDOWN_SECS between claims.

instructions.name: close_auction
docs: Close an active auction after the deadline and queue winner revelation.
Intentionally permissionless — any wallet can trigger this once the
deadline has passed. This keeps the auction trustless: the winner or any
third party can reveal results without needing the creator to act. The
caller pays only the MPC fee for the reveal computation.

instructions.name: create_auction
docs: Create a new auction. The encrypted state is not initialized yet —
call `init_auction_mpc` next to seed it via MPC.

instructions.name: init_auction_mpc
docs: Queue MPC to produce `Enc<Mxe, AuctionState>` initialized to zeros.

instructions.name: init_auction_state_callback
docs: Callback: store encrypted zero state, activate the auction.

instructions.name: refund_credit
docs: Refund the participation credit to a non-winning bidder after finalization.

instructions.name: reveal_winner_callback
docs: Callback: store revealed winner index and Vickrey price; finalize auction.

instructions.name: settle_auction
docs: Settle the auction: transfer the Vickrey price to the creator and refund
the remainder to the winner. Callable by anyone after finalization.

accounts.name: creator
docs: The auction creator — receives the Vickrey price.

accounts.name: winner
docs: The winning bidder — receives the ceiling − winning_price refund.

instructions.name: submit_bid_callback
docs: Callback: store updated encrypted state after a bid is registered.

instructions.name: withdraw_escrow
docs: Withdraw the full SOL escrow for a losing bidder after finalization.

errors.name: AbortedComputation
errors.msg: The computation was aborted

errors.name: ClusterNotSet
errors.msg: MPC cluster not configured

errors.name: TitleTooLong
errors.msg: Auction title exceeds 64 characters

errors.name: DescriptionTooLong
errors.msg: Auction description exceeds 256 characters

errors.name: EndTimeInPast
errors.msg: End time must be in the future

errors.name: InvalidAuctionStatus
errors.msg: Auction is not in the expected status for this operation

errors.name: AuctionEnded
errors.msg: Auction bidding period has ended

errors.name: AuctionNotEnded
errors.msg: Auction deadline has not yet passed

errors.name: AuctionFull
errors.msg: Auction has reached maximum bidder capacity

errors.name: NoBids
errors.msg: No bids were placed — cannot determine a winner

errors.name: InvalidClaimAmount
errors.msg: Claim amount must be between 1 and 10

errors.name: InsufficientCredits
errors.msg: Insufficient credits — claim credits before bidding

errors.name: AuctionNotFinalized
errors.msg: Auction is not yet finalized

errors.name: AlreadyRefunded
errors.msg: Credit already refunded for this bid

errors.name: WinnerCannotRefund
errors.msg: Winners cannot reclaim their participation credit

errors.name: InvalidBidRecord
errors.msg: Bid record does not belong to this user

errors.name: BidInFlight
errors.msg: A bid computation is already in flight — wait for it to finalize before bidding again

errors.name: InitInFlight
errors.msg: An initialization computation is already in flight for this auction

errors.name: AuctionHasBids
errors.msg: Cannot cancel an auction that has received bids

errors.name: Unauthorized
errors.msg: Only the auction creator can perform this action

errors.name: ClaimCooldown
errors.msg: Credits claimed too recently — wait 60 seconds between claims

errors.name: NotWinner
errors.msg: Only the winning bidder's record can be settled

errors.name: AlreadySettled
errors.msg: Auction has already been settled

errors.name: AlreadyWithdrawn
errors.msg: Escrow has already been withdrawn

errors.name: WinnerMustSettle
errors.msg: Winner must call settle_auction, not withdraw_escrow

fields.name: creator
docs: Creator of this auction.

fields.name: nonce
docs: Nonce used to derive this auction's PDA (caller-supplied random u64).

fields.name: title
docs: Human-readable title.

fields.name: description
docs: Human-readable description.

fields.name: end_time
docs: Unix timestamp after which the auction can be closed.

fields.name: bid_count
docs: Number of bids submitted so far (≤ MAX_BIDDERS).

fields.name: bid_in_flight
docs: True while an MPC `submit_bid` computation is in-flight.
Prevents a second bid from reading stale `state_ct` before the first
callback has updated it, which would silently drop the earlier bid.

fields.name: init_queued
docs: True after `init_auction_mpc` has queued the initialisation computation,
cleared once the callback lands. Prevents a duplicate init computation
from racing with the first one.

fields.name: bidders
docs: Bidder public keys in submission order. `bidders[i]` corresponds to
slot index `i` in the encrypted AuctionState.

fields.name: state_ct
docs: Encrypted AuctionState ciphertexts: [max_bid_ct, second_bid_ct, winner_idx_ct].

fields.name: state_nonce
docs: Shared nonce for the encrypted AuctionState.

fields.name: winner_idx
docs: Winner slot index (set at finalization).

fields.name: winning_price
docs: Winning price: second-highest bid, revealed at finalization (Vickrey).

fields.name: status
docs: Lifecycle status.

fields.name: ceiling
docs: Lamports deposited into the bidder's vault PDA at bid time.
Equals the plaintext ceiling passed to the MPC circuit.

fields.name: vault_bump
docs: Bump for the bid_vault PDA — stored so settle/withdraw can sign.

fields.name: settled
docs: True once the winner has called `settle_auction`.

fields.name: escrow_withdrawn
docs: True once a loser has called `withdraw_escrow`.

types.name: ClockAccount
docs: An account storing the current network epoch

types.name: ComputationDefinitionAccount
docs: An account representing a [ComputationDefinition] in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationDefinitionMeta
docs: A computation definition for execution in a MXE.

types.name: ComputationSignature
docs: The signature of a computation defined in a [ComputationDefinition].

fields.name: last_claim_time
docs: Unix timestamp of the last successful `claim_credits` call.
Zero until the first claim is made.

types.name: Epoch
docs: The network epoch

types.name: InitAuctionStateOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: MXEAccount
docs: A MPC Execution Environment.

types.name: MxeStatus
docs: The status of an MXE.

types.name: NodeMetadata
docs: location as [ISO 3166-1 alpha-2](https://www.iso.org/iso-3166-country-codes.html) country code

types.name: NodeRef
docs: A reference to a node in the cluster.
The offset is to derive the Node Account.
The current_total_rewards is the total rewards the node has received so far in the current
epoch.

types.name: Output
docs: An output of a computation.
We currently don't support encrypted outputs yet since encrypted values are passed via
data objects.

types.name: Parameter
docs: A parameter of a computation.
We differentiate between plaintext and encrypted parameters and data objects.
Plaintext parameters are directly provided as their value.
Encrypted parameters are provided as an offchain reference to the data.
Data objects are provided as a reference to the data object account.

types.name: RevealWinnerOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.

types.name: SetUnset
docs: Utility struct to store a value that needs to be set by a certain number of participants (keys
in our case). Once all participants have set the value, the value is considered set and we only
store it once.

types.name: SubmitBidOutput
docs: The output of the callback instruction. Provided as a struct with ordered fields
as anchor does not support tuples and tuple structs yet.
